title: Phishing Awareness
short_description: Identify fake links, urgent messages, and phishing tricks.
learning_objective: Students can recognize phishing indicators in emails, SMS, and URLs.

title: Password Security
short_description: Create strong passwords and avoid password reuse.
learning_objective: Students can apply password best practices and understand password managers.

title: Social Engineering
short_description: Understand manipulation tactics used by attackers.
learning_objective: Students can respond safely to impersonation and pressure tactics.

title: Malware & Safe Downloads
short_description: Avoid unsafe downloads, cracked apps, and malicious files.
learning_objective: Students can identify malware risks and safe installation practices.

title: Privacy Protection
short_description: Control app permissions and protect personal data online.
learning_objective: Students can manage privacy settings and reduce oversharing risks.

title: Online Scam Awareness
short_description: Detect suspicious offers, parcel scams, and financial fraud.
learning_objective: Students can evaluate scam indicators before sharing personal details.

title: Mobile Device Security
short_description: Secure smartphones against unsafe apps and fake updates.
learning_objective: Students can apply mobile security practices for Android and iOS.

title: Public Wi-Fi Safety
short_description: Use public Wi-Fi safely and avoid insecure networks.
learning_objective: Students can explain risks of public Wi-Fi and use safer browsing habits.

title: Two-Factor Authentication
short_description: Use MFA/2FA to protect online accounts.
learning_objective: Students can choose safe authentication methods and avoid OTP scams.

title: Data Breach Response
short_description: Know what to do after an account or password leak.
learning_objective: Students can respond to breach alerts and secure affected accounts.

title: Cyberbullying & Digital Ethics
short_description: Practice respectful and safe online communication.
learning_objective: Students can identify harmful online behavior and report it safely.

title: Safe Online Banking
short_description: Protect banking accounts from phishing, fake TAC/OTP requests, and mule scams.
learning_objective: Students can verify banking domains and avoid financial cyber fraud.

title: Email Security Basics
short_description: Identify suspicious attachments, spoofed senders, and unsafe email habits.
learning_objective: Students can evaluate email safety before opening links or attachments.

title: Secure Social Media Use
short_description: Use privacy settings and avoid oversharing on social platforms.
learning_objective: Students can reduce social media risks such as impersonation, stalking, and data exposure.

title: Cloud Storage Safety
short_description: Protect Google Drive, OneDrive, and shared files from accidental exposure.
learning_objective: Students can manage sharing permissions and secure cloud documents.

title: QR Code Safety
short_description: Recognise fake QR codes and avoid quishing attacks.
learning_objective: Students can verify QR links before submitting sensitive information.

title: Online Shopping Safety
short_description: Avoid fake shops, parcel scams, and payment fraud.
learning_objective: Students can verify sellers, payment methods, and marketplace safety signals.

title: Cyber Hygiene Routine
short_description: Build daily security habits such as updates, backups, and account checks.
learning_objective: Students can apply a simple cyber hygiene routine for personal devices.

title: Software Update & Patch Safety
short_description: Understand why updates fix vulnerabilities and how to update safely.
learning_objective: Students can explain patching and avoid fake update prompts.

title: Ransomware Awareness
short_description: Learn how ransomware spreads and how backups reduce damage.
learning_objective: Students can identify ransomware risks and respond correctly during an incident.

title: Identity Theft Protection
short_description: Protect IC numbers, student IDs, selfies, and personal documents.
learning_objective: Students can recognise identity theft risks and reduce exposure of personal data.

title: Safe Use of AI Tools
short_description: Use AI chatbots safely without leaking confidential data.
learning_objective: Students can identify privacy, misinformation, and academic integrity risks in AI tools.

title: Digital Footprint Management
short_description: Understand how posts, comments, and tagged photos affect reputation.
learning_objective: Students can manage digital footprints and make safer online choices.

title: Secure Messaging Apps
short_description: Use WhatsApp, Telegram, and Discord safely.
learning_objective: Students can secure messaging accounts and avoid suspicious files, groups, and links.

title: Browser & Web Safety
short_description: Browse safely using HTTPS, safe downloads, and permission control.
learning_objective: Students can identify risky websites and manage browser permissions.

title: USB & Removable Media Safety
short_description: Avoid malware from unknown USB drives and removable devices.
learning_objective: Students can apply safe USB handling and scanning procedures.

title: Cyber Incident Reporting
short_description: Know when and how to report cyber incidents.
learning_objective: Students can choose correct reporting channels and preserve evidence.

title: Basic Network Security
short_description: Understand routers, Wi-Fi passwords, and basic network protection.
learning_objective: Students can secure home Wi-Fi and recognise unsafe network settings.

title: Cyber Laws & PDPA Awareness
short_description: Learn basic Malaysian cyber law and personal data responsibilities.
learning_objective: Students can explain responsible behaviour under cyber ethics and data protection principles.

title: Capstone Cyber Safety Challenge
short_description: Apply phishing, password, privacy, scam, malware, and reporting knowledge in mixed scenarios.
learning_objective: Students can combine multiple cyber safety skills to solve realistic cases.
